description: Configure a reusable Data Export Task named 'WeeklyTopSpenders' in DBeaver using the 'Chinook' database connection to automate a weekly report. Write a SQL query to identify the Top 10 Customers by total lifetime spend by joining the 'customers' and 'invoices' tables, summing the 'Total' field, and returning the columns CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, and TotalSpend (ordered by TotalSpend descending). Save this query as 'top_customers_query.sql' in the project. Configure the 'WeeklyTopSpenders' task to export the query results to a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/exports/top_spenders.csv and execute the task to generate the report.
